name: Mint Pastry Wafers
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Whipping cream; or half and half
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour, butter, and whipping cream.
2. Beat on low speed, scraping the bowl often, for 1 to 2 minutes until well mixed.
3. Cover; refrigerate for 1 to 2 hours, or until firm.
4. Preheat oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit; grease cookie sheets.
5. Roll out the dough, half at a time, on a well floured surface to 1/4-inch thickness.
6. Cut out with 2-inch round cookie cutters.
7. Dip both sides of each cookie in sugar.
8. Place half of the cookies 2 inches apart on the cookie sheets.
9. Place 1 mint in the center of each cookie.
10. Top with another cookie; press together around the edges with your fingers.
11. Bake for 8 to 10 minutes, or until the edges are very lightly browned.
12. Cool for 1 minute on the cookie sheets.
13. Remove from pans to cool completely.
